sections.paragraph:
verb סב

to encircle; revolve, rotate; turn; (Archaic) cause, bring about

verb נסב

to turn around; deal with, be about; surround

verb נסב

be endorsed, transferred

verb להסב

to cause, bring about; turn; sit around, recline; endorse, transfer; change

verb הוסב

be encircled, surrounded; turned; be endorsed, transferred; be changed; be referred to

masculine noun

old man; grandfather; old scholar
